title: TNT Pack
description: A simple TNT Modpack. with ALOT of TNT :)
body:
**TNT Pack 1.3.0
Adds alot of TNT (100+) to mess around with.. and destroy ur pc with :)**

Why did i upload this? Because i couldnt find any modpacks for TNT on modrinth.

This modpack includes alot of performance mods aswell. So it wont destroy ur pc imediatly.

MC 1.20.1
Forge

All of the TNT MODS: 

- Lucky TNT mod
- Lucky TNT library
- Normal TNT
- More fun TNT's
- Silly TNT mod
- TNT expanded
- Throwable tnt
- Tnt minecarts
- Unlucky TNT
- Doomsday TNT
- Boom +
- Remote TNT

Might add more in the future! Having fun? Follow this project!

Thanks in advance.

StroopWafelBoyz (Lantern Games Developer)
